name: Profile_R5_ClinicalImpression_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.ClinicalImpression resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 ClinicalImpression resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 ClinicalImpression resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.ClinicalImpression resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 ClinicalImpression resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 ClinicalImpression resources.

element.short: R5: Change in the status/pattern of a subject's condition since previously assessed, such as worsening, improving, or no change (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalImpression.changePattern` has a context of ClinicalImpression based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ClinicalImpression`.
Element `ClinicalImpression.changePattern` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: preparation | in-progress | not-done | on-hold | stopped | completed | entered-in-error | unknown
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalImpression.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ClinicalImpression.status` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `ClinicalImpression.status` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.
This element is labeled as a modifier because the status contains the code entered-in-error that marks the clinical impression as not currently valid.

element.short: R5: What was found additional types
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalImpression.finding.item` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ClinicalImpression.finding.itemCodeableConcept` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Element `ClinicalImpression.finding.item` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ClinicalImpression.finding.itemReference` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ClinicalImpression.finding.item` do not cover the following types: CodeableReference.
